name: Anil Joseph
bio: Telecom architect with 30+ years of experience building and scaling real-world networks across India's evolution—from legacy switching systems to nationwide Number Portability and modern LTE/VoLTE/IMS cores. As Managing Director of Tenet Networks and Credo Networks, he leads the design of rugged connectivity solutions deployed in mission-critical environments globally.
tagline: Designing networks that survive the real world
quickFacts: Background in telecom research and standards
expertise: LTE EPC, VoLTE and IMS core networks
Telecom, IP and SCADA protocol integration
Industrial IoT and critical infrastructure connectivity
End-to-end system design for harsh environments
background: Led architecture and deployment of LTE/VoLTE/IMS solutions
Senior Member of Technical Staff at Oracle/Tekelec
Researcher at DRDO (Defence Research and Development Organisation)
Worked at C-DOT on indigenous telecom systems

name: Zahid Hussain
bio: With 30+ years of experience introducing new technologies and managing global support centres, Zahid has led support for multi-billion USD infrastructures. Previously with NOKIA, AT&T, and Alcatel-Lucent.
tagline: Three decades of turning complexity into reliability

name: Shrikant Gupta
bio: Nearly 20 years of sales leadership, driving businesses to achieve multi-million-dollar growth. Formerly Country Manager for Cambium Networks in India and South East Asia.
tagline: Building partnerships that scale from millions to billions
background: Country Manager at Cambium Networks (India & SE Asia)
Led businesses to multi-million dollar growth
Built channel networks across emerging markets

name: Naresh Chandra
bio: A veteran in managing large-scale projects worth $100M+, with leadership roles in Lucent Technologies, Reliance Communications, and Globacom-Nigeria.
tagline: Delivering billion-dollar projects on time, on budget

name: Rajeev Singh
bio: Expert in deploying and operationalising solutions globally, including implementing Number Portability in India and Russia.
tagline: From deployment to uptime: making systems work globally
background: Led Number Portability implementation in India

name: Shalini Lal
bio: Specialist in managing data-centric networks with experience at Indian Telephone Industries and Idea Cellular.
tagline: Building the culture that builds the technology
